zh.lifeSummary: Cateryne Philpott是Richard Philpott和Lady Elizabeth Long的女兒，於1456年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其。她於1477年與Richard Phillpott Alias Milward在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾艾其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1521年在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cateryne Philpott是Richard Philpott和Lady Elizabeth Long的女儿，于1456年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其。她于1477年与Richard Phillpott Alias Milward在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾艾其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1521年在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾沃頓 武安德 艾其。

nameMeanings.name: Philpott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pott
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Aloys, Christoph, Hans, Otto.
English: from the personal name Pot, an Old French pet form of Philipot (see Philpott ), itself a pet form of Philip .

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a depression in the ground, from Middle English pot, potte ‘pot’ used in this transferred sense, or a habitational name from one of the minor places deriving their name from this word, in the sense ‘pit, hole’.

variants.name: Philpot
meanings: English (southeastern): from the Middle English personal name Phil(i)pot, a pet form of Philip (mainly male but sometimes used for women).

en.lifeSummary: Cateryne Philpott was born in 1456, in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England as the daughter of Richard Philpott and Lady Elizabeth Long. She married Richard Phillpott Alias Milward in 1477, in Edge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1521, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Cateryne Philpott est née en 1456, à Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, fille de Richard Philpott et Lady Elizabeth Long. Elle a épousé Richard Phillpott Alias Milward en 1477, à Edge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1521, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie starb 1521 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Wotton under Edge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Cateryne Philpottは1456年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウオットオン ウンダー エッジでRichard PhilpottとLady Elizabeth Longの娘として生まれた。1477年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアエッジでRichard Phillpott Alias Milwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1521年に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウオットオン ウンダー エッジにて埋葬された。

ko.Wotton Under Edge, Gloucestershire, , En: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지
ko.Wotton-under-Edge, Stroud District, Glou: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지
ko.lifeSummary: Cateryne Philpott(은)는 1456년 영국 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지에서 Richard Philpott(와)과 Lady Elizabeth Long의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 에지에서 Richard Phillpott Alias Milward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1521년 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 보턴 운더 에지에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Richard Phillpott Alias Milward em 1477, em Edge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.Wotton-under-Edge, Stroud District, Glou: воттон ундир эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Cateryne Philpott родилась в 1456 г. в местности воттон ундир эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия. Её родителей звали Richard Philpott и Lady Elizabeth Long. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Phillpott Alias Milward в 1477 г. в местности эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1521 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности воттон ундир эдж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
